style: imposing monstrous voxel low-poly, normal-to-oversized heroic proportions (NOT chibi), crisp cubic MagicaVoxel aesthetic, flat-shaded in-engine
note: Game loads 4 GLBs per big mob: <slug>-rigged.glb (idle), -walking.glb, -running.glb, -attack.glb. Only stoneGiant/stormingVortex/giantDwarf/fireElemental use GLB bodies; minion stays procedural per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-01-low-poly-asset-enhancements-design.md. Avoid chibi/oversized-head proportions (breaks Meshy auto-rig, as seen with the Orc Shaman character).
